holdings.infoBox: OVF is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares Core MSCI EAFE ETF stock at 75.40%, iShares Core MSCI Emerging Markets ETF at 24.75%, Spxw Us 06/22/26 P7500 at 0.14%, Spxw Us 06/23/26 P7350 at 0.05%, and Spxw Us 06/22/26 P7375 at 0.05%.

overview.description: The Overlay Shares Foreign Equity ETF (OVF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to non-U.S. equities combined with a U.S OVF was launched on Sep 30, 2019 and is issued by Liquid Strategies.
